headline: Updates that restart themselves
summary: Aster now reliably closes the old build, replaces it in place, and reopens the updated app automatically.

features.title: Reliable Update and Restart
features.description: The update helper now finishes a stuck old process before reopening the newly installed version.

features.title: Clean app handoff
features.description: Aster refreshes its macOS app registration and removes the previous-build backup before relaunching.

features.title: Home after updating
features.description: The updated app reopens on Home, keeping What's New clear and unobstructed.
